creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I kind of lost track on rtw88 with recent focus on iwlwifi and stability.

Can anyone confirm if rtw88 on 8822CE 8821CE works with 11a/b/g?
15/14/13/and 13.3 from RC1 should be fine for basic use?

Oleg, has your issue been solved?  I cannot remember at all... sorry.
